div.p: Mapping from CH VACD Swissmedic Authorized Vaccine Codes to http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva?vs
Group 1 Mapping from CH VACD Swissmedic Authorized Vaccines to http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva

tr.td: 711-01 (Diphtherie- und Tetanus-Adsorbatimpfstoff für Kinder unter 8 Jahren)
711-02 (Diphtherie- und Tetanus-Adsorbatimpfstoff für Erwachsene und Kinder ab 7 Jahren)
VAC1017 (SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.1 (50 µg/50 µg)/mL MULTIDOSE MODERNA)
VAC1032 (SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.1 (25 µg/25 µg) MODERNA)
VAC1036 (SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.4-5 25 µg/25 µg MODERNA)
VAC1036 (SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.4-5 25 µg/25 µg MODERNA)
VAC1058 (SPIKEVAX XBB.1.5 0,1 mg/mL dose 50 µg MODERNA)
VAC1058 (SPIKEVAX XBB.1.5 0,1 mg/mL dose 50 µg MODERNA)

title.value: ConceptMap for mapping Swissmedic vaccine codes to Nuva codes

description.value: This ConceptMap maps vaccine codes from the Swissmedic CodeSystem to the corresponding codes in the Nuva terminology. It is generated based on the provided CSV mapping file and the Swissmedic CodeSystem.

display.value: Diphtherie- und Tetanus-Adsorbatimpfstoff für Kinder unter 8 Jahren
Diphtherie- und Tetanus-Adsorbatimpfstoff für Erwachsene und Kinder ab 7 Jahren
SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.1 (50 µg/50 µg)/mL MULTIDOSE MODERNA
Comirnaty® Original/Omicron BA.1 15/15 µg pro Dosis
Spikevax Bivalent Original / Omicron 10 mg/ml, Fertigspritze
SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.1 (25 µg/25 µg) MODERNA
SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.4-5 25 µg/25 µg MODERNA
Spikevax Bivalent Original / Omicron BA.4-5, Fertigspritze
SPIKEVAX BIVALENT ORIGINAL/OMICRON BA.4-5 25 µg/25 µg MODERNA
SPIKEVAX XBB.1.5 0,1 mg/mL dose 50 µg MODERNA
SPIKEVAX XBB.1.5 0,1 mg/mL dose 50 µg MODERNA
